title: CapeTweaks
body:
**CapeTweaks** is a small mod for vanilla capes. It does not add any new capes.

With **CapeTweaks** you can smooth their movement, or have them not show up at all! You can also toggle if elytra can have the cape texture.
Additionally, you can also hide specific capes, like Minecon capes and migration capes!

**CapeTweaks** does *not* add OptiFine capes. For that, see [Kappa](https://modrinth.com/mod/kappa). **CapeTweaks** also isn't guaranteed to work with any modded cape.

This mod depends on [Cloth Config](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config) to run. You also need [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) to configure. Fabric API is *not* needed.
